TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gluw na 'tayal kahul sa kay ni Yutas mu hya ga, ita' 'tayal hya ga minkahul kya pinsbkan qu inkhulan ta, maki sa rhzyal ta Taiwan qani ita 'tayal hya ga spzyang balay ghci' nyux ta' ki'an ita' hya'. misu qani hya' ga nyux ta' ps'nakun smlalu' na thawki' thayluw maha Squliq ru C'uli' ga, laha' nanak smlalu' qasa hya', ana ga lta' 'tayal hya' ga kya nanak sinllwan na nbkis sraral hya', ita' 'tayal hya' ga cyugal qu puqing balay pinsgayan ta'. qutux ga yaqu kmal maha ngasal, ru qutux hya' ga kmal maha Sali', ru yaqu maha Muyaw. yalaw gi nanak yaqu gluw na ngasal qani qu kya lalu' na puqing naha' hiya', nanu' yaqu Kinhakul qani, yani qu spzyang naha' galan puqing na qutux gluq qani, nanu' qu maha Sali' qani ga wayal naha' zngyan qu lalu' na puqing naha' lru sisay maha Mthu' laha' la, nanu' qu muyaw uzi ga, Mkmuyaw sawn uzi la. misu qani lga, kahul sa kmal maha ngasal hya ga, nyuw mgcyugal qu pinsgayan naha' la, qutux ga Mqnazi', qutux ga Mlipa', ru Haga' paris. nanu qu kmal maha Muyaw hya ga Mayspaziq ru Mnibu' ru Sqoyaw ru Plngawal spayat qu pisgayan naha' hya'. nanu' qu kmal maha Sali' hya' lga, nanu' yaqu Mbala'Nanto squ Mbala' kya Nango, ru Mks'iya' Mesawlay ru Mks'iya' Melubung, ru Mktasi', ru Maysingaw, ru Mklapay, mpitu' qu pinsgayan naha' laha', plpgun kwara lga mawpuw spayat kwara' qu ini ptnaq gluw na kkayal kwara la. taqu cyugal ini' ptnaq gluw na kkayal kay' qani ga, mqbbaq cikay mkayal qu gluw na kmal maha ngasal squ Sali' hiya, gi nanak yaqu kya "q" na gluw na ngasal hya' ga, ungat "q" na gluw na Sali' hya'. skahul sa kin ini' ptnaq na kkayal qani mita' qu cyugal gluw na pinsgayan naha' qani ga, nanak yaqu gluw na Muyaw qani qu twahiq hazi' kin muci' na kkayal naha' hya', nanu' yasa qu sawn qani mita' qu pinsgayan naha' qani ga, musa' bsyaq hazi' pinshriqan na gluw na Muyaw qani hya'! ruw taqu pinsgagay na gluw na ngasal squ Sali' qani mita' ga, musa' yaqu gluw na Sali' qu minsgagay kahul sa puqing balay kni'an na Tayal qani, gi rima' pzyux qu pinsgagay na gluw qasa hya', ta qu gluw na ngasal qani hya' lga minhlhil msgagay laha' gi ini' kpzyux na' qu pinsgayan naha' laha'.
S.PHON: …£luw na Ētajal kańßul s~…ēa kaj ni jutas~…ē mu ńßja …£a, ita Ē Ētajal ńßja …£a minkańßul kja pins~…ēő≤kan qu inkńßulan ta, maki s~…ēa rńßzjal ta taiwan qani ita Ētajal ńßja …£a s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤alaj …£ńß ¶~ ®i Ē njux ta Ē ki Ēan ita Ē ńßja Ē. mis~…ēu qani ńßja Ē …£a njux ta Ē ps~…ē Ēnakun s~…ēmlalu Ē na tńßawki Ē tńßajluw mańßa s~…ēquliq ru ¶~ ® Ēuli Ē …£a, lańßa Ē nanak s~…ēmlalu Ē qas~…ēa ńßja Ē, ana …£a lta Ē Ētajal ńßja Ē …£a kja nanak s~…ēinllwan na nő≤kis~…ē s~…ēraral ńßja Ē, ita Ē Ētajal ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®ju…£al qu puqiŇč ő≤alaj pins~…ē…£ajan ta Ē. qutux …£a jaqu kmal mańßa Ňčas~…ēal, ru qutux ńßja Ē …£a kmal mańßa s~…ēali Ē, ru jaqu mańßa mujaw. jalaw …£i nanak jaqu …£luw na Ňčas~…ēal qani qu kja lalu Ē na puqiŇč nańßa Ē ńßija Ē, nanu Ē jaqu kinńßakul qani, jani qu s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē …£alan puqiŇč na qutux …£luq qani, nanu Ē qu mańßa s~…ēali Ē qani …£a wajal nańßa Ē zŇčjan qu lalu Ē na puqiŇč nańßa Ē lru s~…ēis~…ēaj mańßa mtńßu Ē lańßa Ē la, nanu Ē qu mujaw uzi …£a, mkmujaw s~…ēawn uzi la. mis~…ēu qani l…£a, kańßul s~…ēa kmal mańßa Ňčas~…ēal ńßja …£a, njuw m…£ ¶~ ®ju…£al qu pins~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē la, qutux …£a mqnazi Ē, qutux …£a mlipa Ē, ru ńßa…£a Ē paris~…ē. nanu qu kmal mańßa mujaw ńßja …£a majs~…ēpaziq ru mniő≤u Ē ru s~…ēqojaw ru plŇčawal s~…ēpajat qu pis~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē ńßja Ē. nanu Ē qu kmal mańßa s~…ēali Ē ńßja Ē l…£a, nanu Ē jaqu mő≤ala Ēnanto s~…ēqu mő≤ala Ē kja naŇčo, ru mks~…ē Ēija Ē mes~…ēawlaj ru mks~…ē Ēija Ē meluő≤uŇč, ru mktas~…ēi Ē, ru majs~…ēiŇčaw, ru mklapaj, mpitu Ē qu pins~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē lańßa Ē, plp…£un kwara l…£a mawpuw s~…ēpajat kwara Ē qu ini ptnaq …£luw na kkajal kwara la. taqu ¶~ ®ju…£al ini Ē ptnaq …£luw na kkajal kaj Ē qani …£a, mqő≤ő≤aq ¶~ ®ikaj mkajal qu …£luw na kmal mańßa Ňčas~…ēal s~…ēqu s~…ēali Ē ńßija, …£i nanak jaqu kja "q" na …£luw na Ňčas~…ēal ńßja Ē …£a, uŇčat "q" na …£luw na s~…ēali Ē ńßja Ē. s~…ēkańßul s~…ēa kin ini Ē ptnaq na kkajal qani mita Ē qu ¶~ ®ju…£al …£luw na pins~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē qani …£a, nanak jaqu …£luw na mujaw qani qu twańßiq ńßazi Ē kin mu ¶~ ®i Ē na kkajal nańßa Ē ńßja Ē, nanu Ē jas~…ēa qu s~…ēawn qani mita Ē qu pins~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē qani …£a, mus~…ēa Ē ő≤s~…ējaq ńßazi Ē pins~…ēńßriqan na …£luw na mujaw qani ńßja Ē! ruw taqu pins~…ē…£a…£aj na …£luw na Ňčas~…ēal s~…ēqu s~…ēali Ē qani mita Ē …£a, mus~…ēa Ē jaqu …£luw na s~…ēali Ē qu mins~…ē…£a…£aj kańßul s~…ēa puqiŇč ő≤alaj kni Ēan na tajal qani, …£i rima Ē pzjux qu pins~…ē…£a…£aj na …£luw qas~…ēa ńßja Ē, ta qu …£luw na Ňčas~…ēal qani ńßja Ē l…£a minńßlńßil ms~…ē…£a…£aj lańßa Ē …£i ini Ē kpzjux na Ē qu pins~…ē…£ajan nańßa Ē lańßa Ē.
S.FORM: gluw na 'tayal kahul sa kay ni Yutas mu hya ga, ita' 'tayal hya ga minkahul kya pinsbkan qu inkhulan ta, maki sa rhzyal ta Taiwan qani ita 'tayal hya ga spzyang balay ghci' nyux ta' ki'an ita' hya'. misu qani hya' ga nyux ta' ps'nakun smlalu' na thawki' thayluw maha Squliq ru C'uli' ga, laha' nanak smlalu' qasa hya', ana ga lta' 'tayal hya' ga kya nanak sinllwan na nbkis sraral hya', ita' 'tayal hya' ga cyugal qu puqing balay pinsgayan ta'. qutux ga yaqu kmal maha ngasal, ru qutux hya' ga kmal maha Sali', ru yaqu maha Muyaw. yalaw gi nanak yaqu gluw na ngasal qani qu kya lalu' na puqing naha' hiya', nanu' yaqu Kinhakul qani, yani qu spzyang naha' galan puqing na qutux gluq qani, nanu' qu maha Sali' qani ga wayal naha' zngyan qu lalu' na puqing naha' lru sisay maha Mthu' laha' la, nanu' qu muyaw uzi ga, Mkmuyaw sawn uzi la. misu qani lga, kahul sa kmal maha ngasal hya ga, nyuw mgcyugal qu pinsgayan naha' la, qutux ga Mqnazi', qutux ga Mlipa', ru Haga' paris. nanu qu kmal maha Muyaw hya ga Mayspaziq ru Mnibu' ru Sqoyaw ru Plngawal spayat qu pisgayan naha' hya'. nanu' qu kmal maha Sali' hya' lga, nanu' yaqu Mbala'Nanto squ Mbala' kya Nango, ru Mks'iya' Mesawlay ru Mks'iya' Melubung, ru Mktasi', ru Maysingaw, ru Mklapay, mpitu' qu pinsgayan naha' laha', plpgun kwara lga mawpuw spayat kwara' qu ini ptnaq gluw na kkayal kwara la. taqu cyugal ini' ptnaq gluw na kkayal kay' qani ga, mqbbaq cikay mkayal qu gluw na kmal maha ngasal squ Sali' hiya, gi nanak yaqu kya "q" na gluw na ngasal hya' ga, ungat "q" na gluw na Sali' hya'. skahul sa kin ini' ptnaq na kkayal qani mita' qu cyugal gluw na pinsgayan naha' qani ga, nanak yaqu gluw na Muyaw qani qu twahiq hazi' kin muci' na kkayal naha' hya', nanu' yasa qu sawn qani mita' qu pinsgayan naha' qani ga, musa' bsyaq hazi' pinshriqan na gluw na Muyaw qani hya'! ruw taqu pinsgagay na gluw na ngasal squ Sali' qani mita' ga, musa' yaqu gluw na Sali' qu minsgagay kahul sa puqing balay kni'an na Tayal qani, gi rima' pzyux qu pinsgagay na gluw qasa hya', ta qu gluw na ngasal qani hya' lga minhlhil msgagay laha' gi ini' kpzyux na' qu pinsgayan naha' laha'.
